text:
// Loader double
// ==========================================================================

// Config
$loader-double--size-external: $loader-double--size + ($loader-double--border * 2)

.loader-double

  &:after,
  &:before
    content: ''
    position: fixed
    border-radius: 50%
    border: solid $loader-double--border
    animation: rotation 1s linear infinite

  &:after
    width: $loader-double--size
    height: $loader-double--size
    border-color: $loader-double--color
    border-left-color: transparent
    top: calc(50% - #{$loader-double--size / 2})
    left: calc(50% - #{$loader-double--size / 2})

  &:before
    width: $loader-double--size-external
    height: $loader-double--size-external
    border-color: $loader-double--color-external
    border-right-color: transparent
    animation-duration: 2s
    top: calc(50% - #{($loader-double--size / 2) + $loader-double--border})
    left: calc(50% - #{($loader-double--size / 2) + $loader-double--border})

// Loader bar
// ==========================================================================

.loader-bar-ping-pong
  &:before
    content: ''
    width: 200px
    height: 20px
    position: absolute
    top: calc(50% - 10px)
    left: calc(50% - 100px)
    background-color: $loader-bar-ping--bar

  &:after
    content: ''
    width: 50px
    height: 20px
    position: absolute
    top: calc(50% - 10px)
    left: calc(50% - 100px)
    background-color: $loader-bar-ping--ticker
    animation: moveBarPingPong .5s linear infinite alternate

  &[data-rounded]
    &:before
      border-radius: 10px

    &:after
      border-radius: 50%
      width: 20px
      animation-name: moveBarPingPongRounded

@keyframes moveBarPingPong
  0%
    left: calc(50% - 100px)

  100%
    left: calc(50% - -50px)

@keyframes moveBarPingPongRounded
  0%
    left: calc(50% - 100px)

  100%
    left: calc(50% - -80px)

// Loader border
// ==========================================================================

// Corners animation
@keyframes corners
  6%
    width: $loader-border--width * 4
    height: $loader-border--height

  25%
    width: $loader-border--width
    height: $loader-border--height
    left: calc(100% - #{$loader-border--width})
    top: 0

  31%
    height: $loader-border--height * 4

  50%
    height: $loader-border--height
    top: calc(100% - #{$loader-border--height})
    left: calc(100% - #{$loader-border--width})

  56%
    width: $loader-border--width * 4

  75%
    width: $loader-border--width
    left: 0
    top: calc(100% - #{$loader-border--height})

  81%
    height: $loader-border--width * 4


.loader-border

  // Before is used for data-text attribute
  &[data-text]:before
    color: $loader-border--text-color

  &:after
    content: ''
    position: absolute
    top: 0
    left: 0
    width: $loader-border--width
    height: $loader-border--height
    background-color: $loader-border--color
    animation: corners 3s ease both infinite

$sm: 576px
$md: 768px
$lg: 992px
$xl: 1200px

=col_width($width)
	-ms-flex-basis: ($width / 12) * 100%
	flex-basis: ($width / 12) * 100%
	max-width: ($width / 12) * 100%

=col_type_width($type)
	@for $width from 1 through 12
		.col-#{$type}-#{$width}
			+col_width($width)

.container, .container-fluid
	padding-left: 1rem
	padding-right: 1rem

.container
	width: 100%
	margin-left: auto
	margin-right: auto

.row
	display: flex
	flex-direction: row
	flex-wrap: wrap
	align-content: flex-start
	margin-left: -1rem
	margin-right: -1rem

.col
	display: inline-flex

.col, [class*="col-"]
	width: 100%
	padding-left: 1rem
	padding-right: 1rem

@for $width from 1 through 12
	.col-#{$width}, .col-xs-#{$width}
		+col_width($width)

@media (min-width: $sm)
	.container
		max-width: 540px
	+col_type_width("sm")
@media (min-width: $md)
	.container
		max-width: 720px
	+col_type_width("md")
@media (min-width: $lg)
	.container
		max-width: 960px
	+col_type_width("lg")
@media (min-width: $xl)
	.container
		max-width: 1140px
	+col_type_width("xl")

=computer
	position: absolute
	top: 0
	transform: translateX($size*.6) translateY($size*.6) rotateZ(-45deg)
	.screen-foot
		+tile($size*.2, $size*.2, 2px, $computer-color0)
		transform: translateX(-$size*.1) translateY(-$size*.2) translateZ(3px)
	.screen-pod
		+cube($size*.1, $size*.05, $size*.2, $computer-color0)
		transform: translateX($size*.05)
	.screen
		+cube($size*.07*16, $size*.05, $size*.07*9, $computer-color0)
		transform: translateX(-$size*.07*16*.5+$size*.05)
		> *:nth-child(2)
			background-color: lighten(black, 20%)
			border: 3px solid $computer-color0
	.keyboard
		+tile($size*.6, $size*.3, 2px, $computer-color0)
		transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.2) translateZ(3px)
	.mouse
		+tile($size*.1, $size*.2, 2px, $computer-color0)
		transform: translateX($size*.3) translateY($size*.3) translateZ(3px) rotateZ(10deg)
		border-radius: 1px 1px 50% 50%
		text-align: center
		font-size: xx-small

@import '../quarks/border'
@import '../quarks/typography'
@import '../quarks/flex'

.yoo-avatar
  +border-radius('circular')
  +flex(row, wrap, center, center)
  background: var(--primaryBase)
  font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
  +font-size('xl')
  +font-weight('bold')

  &--small
    width: 40px
    height: 40px
    +font-size('lg')

  &--medium
    width: 56px
    height: 56px

  &--large
    width: 80px
    height: 80px
    +font-size('hg')

  &--xlarge
    width: 104px
    height: 104px
    font-size: var(--font-hg)

  &--primary
    background: var(--primaryBase)

  &--danger
    background: var(--dangerBase)

  &--light
    background: var(--primaryBase)

  &--dark
    background: var(--greyBase)

  &__text
    color: var(--color-white)
    &--light
      color: var(--color-white)
    &--dark
      color: var(--greyDark)

$x-light: 0px!default
$y-light: 2px!default
$z-lighting-color: #888!default

=z-position($z-index: 0, $shadow: false, $text: false)
  z-index: $z-index * 100
  @if $shadow == true
    box-shadow: $x-light $y-light ($z-index * 2) $z-lighting-color
  @if $shadow == false
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 transparent
  @if $text == true
    text-shadow: 45px 45px 0 $z-lighting-color
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 transparent
  @if $z-index > 10
    @error "oops the $z-index value for the mixin z-position was set to #{$z-index}, keep the value between 0 and 10."


.z-button
  +z-position($z-index: 4px, $shadow: true)

.z-panel
  +z-position($z-index: 8px, $shadow: true)

.z-dropdown
  +z-position($z-index: 8px, $shadow: true)

.z-modal
  +z-position($z-index: 10px, $shadow: true)

.z-icon
  +z-position($z-index: 10px, $shadow: false, $text: true)

@import '../bosons/margin'
@import '../bosons/padding'
@import '../bosons/YooGridLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooFlexLayout'
@import '../bosons/YooScrollView'



@import '../quarks/animation'
@import '../quarks/border'
@import '../quarks/shadows'
@import '../quarks/typography'
@import '../quarks/flex'


.yoo-icon
  +font-size('md')

  // SIZE
  &__size
    &--tn
      +font-size('tn')
    &--xs
      +font-size('xs')
    &--sm
      +font-size('sm')
    &--md
      +font-size('md')
    &--lg
      +font-size('lg')
    &--xl
      +font-size('xl')
    &--hg
      +font-size('hg')

  // FILL COLORS
  &__fill
    &--neutral
      color: var(--greyBase)
    &--primary
      color: var(--primaryBase)
    &--danger
      color: var(--dangerBase)
    &--dark
      color: var(--greyDark)
    &--black
      color: var(--color-black)
    &--white
      color: var(--color-white)

@import '../quarks/typography'


.yoo-list-item
  color: var(--greyBase)
  font-family: var(--fontFamily-primary)
  @include font-size('lg')

  &__style
    &--wrap
      flex-wrap: wrap !important

  &--border-left
    border-left: var(--spacing-xs) solid
    padding-left: var(--spacing-md)

  &--separated
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--greyLight)

  &__fill
    &--border-neutral
      border-left-color: var(--greyBase)

    &--border-primary
      border-left-color: var(--primaryBase)

    &--border-danger
      border-left-color: var(--dangerBase)

    &--border-light
      border-left-color: var(--greyLight)

    &--border-dark
      border-left-color: var(--greyDark)

    &--border-darkest
      border-left-color: var(--greyDarkest)

  &__title
    margin: 0
    +font-weight('medium')
    color: var(--color-black)
    +font-size('lg')

  &__subtitle
    +font-weight('medium')
    +font-size('xs')
    color:  var(--primaryDark)
    margin-left: var(--spacing-xs)

=desk
	position: absolute
	top: 0
	width: $size*2
	height: $size*3
	> *
		transform: translateZ($size)
		&:nth-child(1)
			+tile($size*2, $size, 3px, lightgrey)
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 20px 10px 10px 0
			.table-pod
				position: absolute
				top: 0
				&:first-child
					transform: translateX($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(2)
					transform: translateX(-$size*.4) translateY($size*.1) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg) rotateY(-90deg)
				&:nth-child(3)
					transform: translateX($size*.1) translateY(-$size*.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)
		&:nth-child(2)
			+tile($size, $size*2, 3px, lightgrey)
			top: $size
			&, &::before
				border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px
			.table-pod
				position: absolute
				top: 0
				transform: translateY($size*1.4) translateZ(-$size/2) rotateX(-90deg)

// Inline Footnote Reference
.footnote-reference
  font-size: var(--font-size--small--4)
  vertical-align: super

// Definition list, listing the content of each note.
// docutils <= 0.17
dl.footnote.brackets
  font-size: var(--font-size--small)
  color: var(--color-foreground-secondary)

  display: grid
  grid-template-columns: max-content auto
  dt
    margin: 0
    > .fn-backref
      margin-left: 0.25rem

    &:after
      content: ":"

    .brackets
      &:before
        content: "["
      &:after
        content: "]"

  dd
    margin: 0
    padding: 0 1rem

// docutils >= 0.18
aside.footnote
  font-size: var(--font-size--small)
  color: var(--color-foreground-secondary)

aside.footnote > span,
div.citation > span
  float: left
  font-weight: 500
  padding-right: 0.25rem

aside.footnote > *:not(span),
div.citation > p
  margin-left: 2rem
